item.title: It’s like unlocking a new room in the house of life

item.description: Rocks fall. Everyone dies.
item.dc:creator: Tyrannotron

item.title: (OC) Reference to MV Women Who Pose With Swords Like Guys On Tinder Pose With Fish
item.description:
I've seen all the poses. The thumbs up always gets me to laugh. (Not my best hair day but it's been windy okay.)
The dead stare cause it's all about the fish
The side hold
The front tilt
On your knees
My knees are really hurting but it's self sacrifice to impress the ladies
In yo face! Sorry for selfies but I was peer pressured by my comment in a most viral post Reference link: https://imgur.com/gallery/iEyJClE Y'all got me to get on my knees and share my own poses I've seen. Hope you like my gladius. Obviously a replica but still pretty heavy and fun. Got it for $5 at a garage sale over 10 years ago. @TheBloodyLady
item.dc:creator: princesscindycat

item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.title: Sold my first order of tacos!
item.description: Put tacos on my menu today and someone ordered four! OH YEAAA celebrate with me!!!!!! Two chicken tacos on corn tortillas with tomatoes and red onions and spicy green sauce on the side Two beef tacos on corn tortillas with peppers and onions
item.dc:creator: BeardedBehemyth

item.title: The 411th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
Let Me IIIIIIIIIINNNNN!!!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Better than Trumpers
DISCLAIMER: I DO NOT publicly condone harming children, even if they are bullies.
(Austria, Germany)
Ope. Minnesota.
So true
mmmmm soup
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.dc:creator: DarkTwistyAndShiny

item.title: Corpo greed
item.description: The prices are what's so absurd just because they're adding "Ah Ay". While purging their useful stuff like the synchronized cloud service. Now it's useless legacy page, which they didn't warn you about. They just warned you about the synchronized part being disabled. Now my plan says 100GB cloud service while I cannot do anything with?? What a BS!! Most viral edit: I hit viral for the first time since I joined. Love the community and its helpful and generous people. Thank you and stay healthy!
item.dc:creator: pareidoliaperson
